creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 159048
update size+sha256 hash to accommodate update

There's a one-line fix committed by cacti that prevents the entire product running when upgrading from an earlier version :-(

As it's a single line fix, they rebuilt the tarball instead of incrementing the version number.

This means it breaks the previous 0.8.8f build too.

Please also merge this change into the quarterly builds.


Poudriere testport logs are available at:

http://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/0.8.8f_1/
